name: JAIC Co.,Ltd.
summary: JAIC Co.,Ltd. provides employment and recruitment support services. It offers young, female full-time, new graduate student, and university dropout employment and recruitment support services. The company also engages in education training business, including developing and selling employee education teaching materials. In addition, it develops and operates career education and employment support programs with universities. The company was founded in 1991 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
